posts.author: ToucanAgency (Toucan Agency)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

We are an Event and Films agency, looking for a Monday.com specialist to talk to, to better understand:

Gannt feature:
• How to use the Gannt feature to pull from subsections’ timelines to highlight a clash in resource
• A way to create a Gannt of multiple projects/boards to track project progression

CRM capability:

  • Pipeline management
  • Metrics dashboard for business development
  • Emailing and contact within prospects records
  • Message sequencing capability (not sure I want to use this but would be useful to know)
  • API link with Mailchimp or other mailing system

Ideally, we’d like to have an intro hour to talk through our problems and for the specialist to present back a solution, which we can then progress to implement as well as a general walk through of best practice and the systems capabilities.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @ToucanAgency and hello again on behalf of the team at CarbonWeb

You made a post a few days ago and I know a few different partners responded and are interested in connecting with you! There are a lot of great teams within the monday.com community and I wanted to just reshare my original response.

Monday.com specialist Hire an Expert
Hey there @ToucanAgency and welcome to the forums! What you are requesting is completely possible in the new CarbonTO-DO Suite. The team at CarbonWeb are proud to bring this to the monday.com community entirely FREE with our Embed Anything app included. This tool will allow you to better manage your current projects, timelines, and daily tasks as a team through sprints! We provide a variety of other services as well. Whether you want to discuss how we can customize this suite for you, or a la…

I hope to connect with you soon!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
